name: Emil Design Eng
description: Emil Kowalski's design-engineering philosophy for UI polish, components, animation decisions, and the invisible details that make software feel great.

install.cursor: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill emil-design-eng -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill emil-design-eng -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill emil-design-eng -a codex -g -y
install.vscode: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill emil-design-eng -a github-copilot -g -y
